block_00: Will Dropbox beat Q2 earnings expectations?
block_01: Analysts are offering a bullish outlook on the cloud service giant’s future performance.
block_02: All eyes are on Dropbox as it prepares to release its second quarterly earnings report since its successful IPO in March. The report is set to come out on August 9th after market close — will it send stock soaring or will Dropbox fall short of expectations?
